title: The Cipher of Healing
description: A 6-station guided journey that decodes the language of your wounds, inhabits the zero of the present, and restores the future you were always meant to live.
quote: A cipher is code. A zero. A circle. This course gives you both the key and the courage to use it.

stations.title: The Cipher Framework
stations.desc: Set your intention. Learn what the cipher means — as code, as zero, as circle. Make the commitment to honesty.

stations.title: Roots of the Past
stations.desc: Map your wounds without reliving them. Childhood patterns, family roles, attachment styles — the code you inherited.

stations.title: Breaking the Code
stations.desc: Recognize trauma responses in daily life. Name the triggers. Close the gap between stimulus and choice.

stations.title: Healing in Motion
stations.desc: Mind-body reset. Cognitive reframing. Rewriting beliefs that were never yours to begin with.

stations.title: Rebuilding Resilience
stations.desc: Daily habits that compound. Boundaries as love. The 30-day tracker that keeps the fresh cut clean.

stations.title: The Cipher of the Future
stations.desc: Visualize the healed self. Write your Legacy Letter. Declare what you pass forward — and what ends with you.

testimonials.quote: I've done therapy, journaling, all of it. The Cipher was different. It didn't just ask me to feel — it asked me to decode. By Station 3, I could name what I was doing in real time.
testimonials.name: Kezia M.

testimonials.quote: The Legacy Letter I wrote in Station 6 is the most important thing I've ever put on paper. I never thought about healing as something I was doing for my children too.
testimonials.name: David R.

testimonials.quote: Station 5 — the resilience practice — is now my morning. I didn't think I was capable of daily practice, but this made it feel like self-respect, not punishment.
testimonials.name: Amara J.

pricingTiers.name: The Cipher
pricingTiers.description: Full course access, self-paced for life

pricingTiers.name: The Cipher + Guided Integration
pricingTiers.description: Course plus one private integration session
